name: AI Landing Zone — Advanced
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on region, reserved instances, enterprise agreements, and network traffic. This is a platform play — costs are shared across all AI workloads deployed into the landing zone.

services.name: Azure Virtual Network (Multi-Region)
services.purpose: Hub-spoke topology — regional hubs with peered spoke VNets for AI workloads

services.name: Azure Firewall
services.purpose: Centralized egress filtering, FQDN rules, threat intelligence, TLS inspection

prod.note: Threat intel, IDPS in alert mode, ~1TB processed

enterprise.note: TLS inspection, IDPS deny mode, multi-hub, ~5TB processed

services.name: Azure Policy
services.purpose: Guardrails — enforce AI service SKUs, regions, network rules, tagging standards

prod.note: Custom policy definitions, deny mode, remediation tasks

services.name: Azure RBAC + Entra ID
services.purpose: Identity governance — custom roles, PIM, access reviews for AI resources

enterprise.note: ~25 users, PIM, access reviews, identity governance

services.name: Azure Private DNS Zones
services.purpose: Private endpoint DNS resolution for AI services, storage, databases

services.name: Azure Monitor + Log Analytics
services.purpose: Centralized platform monitoring — network flows, policy compliance, security alerts

services.name: Microsoft Defender for Cloud
services.purpose: Cloud security posture — vulnerability assessment, threat protection, compliance scoring

enterprise.note: Full CWP, servers, containers, databases, DNS

services.name: Key Vault (Platform)
services.purpose: Platform secrets — firewall certs, Entra app registrations, shared keys

services.name: Azure Bastion
services.purpose: Secure RDP/SSH access to VMs in the landing zone — no public IPs required

optimization_tips: Use Azure Firewall Basic for dev — saves $400/month vs Standard with sufficient dev features
Azure Policy is always free — invest time in policy definitions before buying security tools
Use Entra ID Free tier for dev — upgrade to P1/P2 only for conditional access and PIM
Deploy Azure Bastion Developer SKU for dev — free alternative to Basic ($140/month)
Consolidate Log Analytics workspaces per region — avoid duplicate ingestion costs
Use Defender for Cloud free tier for dev — CSPM recommendations are free
Share platform landing zone costs across all AI workloads — amortize per team/project
Use Azure Reserved Instances for Firewall in production — saves 20-30% on always-on services
